threats.zh: 主要威胁来自立陶宛大公国、金帐汗国后继诸汗国特别是克里米亚方向、喀山与大草原袭扰；同时西北方向仍需警惕条顿及利沃尼亚势力与边境城镇争夺
threats.en: Major threats came from the Grand Duchy of Lithuania, the successor khanates of the Golden Horde especially in the Crimean direction, Kazan, and steppe raids; in the northwest Muscovy also had to watch the Teutonic and Livonian powers and their competition over frontier towns

populationDescription.zh: 人口主要分布于森林—草原过渡地带、上伏尔加流域、奥卡河流域、诺夫哥罗德旧地和新近整合的东北罗斯地区。聚落以农村为主，城镇数量增加但整体仍属低城市化社会
populationDescription.en: The population was concentrated mainly in the forest-steppe transition zone, the Upper Volga basin, the Oka region, the former Novgorodian lands, and the newly integrated northeastern Rus' territories. Settlement was overwhelmingly rural, and although towns were increasing in number, society remained only lightly urbanized

socialClasses.zh: 大公与宗室、波雅尔、服役贵族、修道院与高级教士、教区神职、商人、手工业者、城镇居民、自由农民、半依附农民、边疆屯民与少量奴仆共同构成社会层级；到1500年前后，农民流动自由已受到更明确限制
socialClasses.en: The social hierarchy included the Grand Prince and princely kin, boyars, service nobles, monasteries and high clergy, parish clergy, merchants, artisans, townspeople, free peasants, semi-dependent peasants, frontier settlers, and a smaller servile population; by around 1500 peasant freedom of movement was coming under clearer restriction

allies.zh: 稳定的正式盟友有限，莫斯科更常依靠临时条约、王朝婚姻、与部分鞑靼势力的权宜合作，以及与东正教世界的宗教纽带
allies.en: Stable formal allies were limited; Moscow more often relied on temporary treaties, dynastic marriages, pragmatic cooperation with certain Tatar forces, and religious ties with the Orthodox world

enemies.zh: 主要对手为立陶宛大公国及其鲁塞尼亚属地竞争者、克里米亚与其他草原汗国、喀山汗国，以及西北边境的利沃尼亚和其他拉丁基督教军事力量
enemies.en: Its principal opponents were the Grand Duchy of Lithuania and rival claimants over Ruthenian lands, Crimea and other steppe khanates, the Khanate of Kazan, and Livonia and other Latin Christian military powers on the northwestern frontier

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交目标是“收集罗斯土地”、削弱草原贡赋传统、争夺东斯拉夫正统地位、控制贸易通道并以婚姻和使节活动提升国际承认。莫斯科在1490年代后已明显从区域强权向跨区域国家迈进
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed at the 'gathering of the Rus' lands,' reducing steppe tributary legacies, asserting primacy over the East Slavic Orthodox world, controlling trade routes, and using marriage and embassies to raise international recognition. By the 1490s Moscow had clearly begun moving from a regional power toward a wider transregional state

era.zh: 文艺复兴时代的东欧晚中世纪—早期近代过渡阶段
era.en: Eastern European late medieval to early early-modern transition within the Renaissance era

keyInnovations.zh: 砖石筑城技术提升、意大利式工程知识引入、火炮与火器逐步扩散、统一法典与文书行政发展、改良铸钟与金属加工、河运与冬季雪道物流体系强化
keyInnovations.en: Advances in brick and masonry fortification, the import of Italian engineering knowledge, the gradual spread of cannon and firearms, the development of unified law and chancery administration, improved bell casting and metalworking, and strengthened riverine and winter-road logistics

strengths.zh: 拥有广阔土地、充足人口、东正教合法性、不断增强的中央集权、强大的服役骑兵体系以及对森林与河网环境的适应能力。其政治整合速度在东欧诸国中极为突出
strengths.en: It possessed vast lands, substantial population, Orthodox legitimacy, growing centralization, a strong service-cavalry system, and deep adaptation to forest and river environments. Its speed of political consolidation was exceptionally notable among Eastern European states

weaknesses.zh: 经济结构仍以低生产率农业为主，城市化和货币化不足，地方差异很大，行政深度有限，面对草原袭扰与多线战争时后勤压力沉重；贵族与宗教地产权力也可能牵制国家改革
weaknesses.en: Its economy still rested on low-productivity agriculture, with limited urbanization and monetization, strong regional variation, and shallow administrative penetration. Steppe raids and multi-front war imposed heavy logistical burdens, while aristocratic and ecclesiastical landholding power could also constrain reform

outlook.zh: 若继续维持财政积储、压制分封、整合诺夫哥罗德与其他罗斯地区，并有效使用火器和边疆防御体系，莫斯科有望在16世纪成长为东欧最重要的陆权国家之一；但这也将伴随更高的军事压力与更严厉的社会控制
outlook.en: If it continued to preserve fiscal reserves, suppress appanage fragmentation, integrate Novgorod and other Rus' regions, and effectively employ firearms and frontier defenses, Moscow was well positioned to become one of the most important land powers in Eastern Europe during the 16th century; this, however, would come with greater military pressure and harsher social control

description.zh: 莫斯科正在整合罗斯诸地，成为东欧北部的新兴强权。
description.en: Moscow was consolidating the Rus' lands and emerging as a major power in northeastern Europe.

governmentForm.zh: 贵族等级制君主国，由国王与强大的贵族议会和郡县体系共同治理
governmentForm.en: A noble estate monarchy, governed jointly by the king, powerful magnates, the Diet, and the county system

socialStructure.zh: 社会由高级贵族、中小贵族、教士、自由王家城市市民、农民与边区军户组成；贵族享有广泛免税与政治特权，农民承担主要地租与劳役
socialStructure.en: Society was structured around high magnates, lesser nobles, clergy, burghers of free royal towns, peasants, and frontier military settlers; nobles held broad tax exemptions and political privileges, while peasants bore most rents and labor obligations

rulingClass.zh: 大贵族家族、高级教士与拥有郡县影响力的贵族集团
rulingClass.en: The ruling class consisted of magnate families, senior clergy, and noble factions influential in the counties

succession.zh: 名义上为世袭君主制，但实际上需经贵族承认与加冕程序确认，王位继承受等级政治强烈影响
succession.en: Nominally hereditary monarchy, but in practice succession required noble recognition and formal coronation, making inheritance strongly shaped by estate politics

structure.zh: 王国政府以国王宫廷、王室议事机构、财政与司法官署、全国等级会议以及郡县自治体系构成。中央权力在1490年后较马加什一世时期有所削弱，地方贵族的政治分量显著上升。
structure.en: The kingdom's government was composed of the royal court, royal councils, fiscal and judicial offices, the national Diet, and a county-based local system. After 1490, central authority weakened compared with the reign of Matthias Corvinus, while the political weight of local nobles rose markedly.

function.zh: 为国王提供政策建议，协调重大军事、财政、外交与任命事务
function.en: Advised the king and coordinated major military, fiscal, diplomatic, and appointment matters

function.zh: 征收王室税赋、管理盐矿与关税收入、监督铸币与王室地产收益
function.en: Collected royal taxes, managed salt and customs revenues, and supervised coinage and income from royal domains

function.zh: 起草敕令、保存文书、处理封授、司法与外交文案
function.en: Drafted decrees, preserved records, and handled grants, judicial documentation, and diplomatic correspondence

function.zh: 审理高级案件、贵族诉讼、土地纠纷与王权相关法律事务
function.en: Heard high cases, noble litigation, land disputes, and legal matters tied to royal authority

function.zh: 管理南部边防线、驻军、筑城维修与对奥斯曼防御协调
function.en: Managed the southern frontier line, garrisons, fortification maintenance, and coordination of defense against the Ottomans

function.zh: 在各郡执行司法、征发、治安与地方政治协商，由贵族主导
function.en: Carried out justice, levies, policing, and local political negotiation in the counties under noble leadership

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以郡为核心，由郡长及贵族大会运作；王家自由城市享有一定自治，边境地区则由军政长官和城堡体系直接管理。
localAdmin.en: Local administration centered on counties, run through ispáns and noble assemblies; free royal towns enjoyed a degree of autonomy, while frontier zones were managed more directly by military governors and fortress systems.

legalSystem.zh: 法律建立在王国习惯法、王室敕令、教会法与等级特权之上。贵族拥有较强法律保障与豁免权，农民则受领主法庭与地方惯例约束。
legalSystem.en: The legal system rested on customary law, royal decrees, canon law, and estate privileges. Nobles enjoyed strong legal protections and exemptions, while peasants were subject to lordly courts and local custom.

taxationSystem.zh: 税收以非常税、关税、盐税、铸币收益、王室地产收入和城市缴纳为主。贵族普遍免于常规直接税，使国家财政对农民、商业与王室专利依赖较大。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on extraordinary levies, customs duties, salt income, mint revenues, royal domain proceeds, and urban payments. Since nobles were broadly exempt from regular direct taxation, the crown depended heavily on peasants, commerce, and royal monopolies.

religion.zh: 以拉丁基督教中的罗马天主教为主，王国内亦有东正教、胡斯派影响区以及犹太社群
religion.en: Predominantly Roman Catholic within Latin Christendom, though the kingdom also contained Orthodox communities, areas touched by Hussite influence, and Jewish communities

philosophy.zh: 政治与伦理思想以经院哲学、天主教王权观、贵族自由观念与文艺复兴人文主义并存
philosophy.en: Political and ethical thought combined scholasticism, Catholic ideas of kingship, noble concepts of liberty, and Renaissance humanism

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母；行政、教会与学术多用拉丁文，日常生活中广泛使用匈牙利语、德语、斯拉夫语及其他地方语言
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used; administration, church, and scholarship relied heavily on Latin, while Hungarian, German, Slavic languages, and other vernaculars were widely spoken in daily life

culturalAchievements.zh: 继承马加什一世时代的人文主义遗产，宫廷与主教座堂仍保持意大利文艺复兴艺术影响；晚期哥特式与早期文艺复兴建筑并存，编年史、法学文书、宗教文学与拉丁学术传统持续发展。
culturalAchievements.en: It inherited the humanist legacy of Matthias Corvinus; the court and episcopal centers still reflected Italian Renaissance artistic influence. Late Gothic and early Renaissance architecture coexisted, while chronicles, legal writing, religious literature, and Latin scholarship continued to develop.

languageFamily.zh: 主体语言匈牙利语属乌拉尔语系，同时境内存在日耳曼、斯拉夫、罗曼与其他语言群体
languageFamily.en: The principal language, Hungarian, belonged to the Uralic family, while Germanic, Slavic, Romance, and other language communities also lived within the kingdom

gdpDescription.zh: 匈牙利在中欧属于中上水平王国经济，农业占主导，但其金银矿、盐业、牧畜输出与多瑙河贸易赋予其较强的财政与战略价值。1490年后中央财政动员能力下降，但整体经济仍具韧性。
gdpDescription.en: Hungary ranked as a middling-to-upper kingdom economy in Central Europe: agrarian in base, but strengthened by precious-metal mining, salt production, livestock exports, and Danubian trade. After 1490 the crown's capacity for central fiscal mobilization declined, yet the overall economy remained resilient.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物农业、葡萄酒生产、畜牧业、金银铜矿开采、盐业、金属冶炼、城镇手工业与河运贸易
mainIndustries.en: Grain agriculture, wine production, animal husbandry, gold, silver, and copper mining, salt extraction, metalworking, urban crafts, and riverine trade

tradeGoods.zh: 牛只、马匹、谷物、葡萄酒、盐、铜、金银、蜂蜡、皮革、木材以及输入的纺织品、奢侈品与武器
tradeGoods.en: Cattle, horses, grain, wine, salt, copper, gold and silver, beeswax, leather, timber, and imported textiles, luxury goods, and weapons

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异极大。贵族拥有土地、城堡、磨坊与役使人口；城镇商人与矿区经营者积累一定货币财富；大多数农民财富有限，以牲畜、农具和粮食储备为主。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied greatly. Nobles held land, castles, mills, and dependent labor; urban merchants and mining entrepreneurs accumulated some monetary wealth; most peasants possessed limited assets, chiefly livestock, tools, and grain stores.

economicSystem.zh: 以封建地产经济为基础，辅以矿业、王室专利、城市市场与区域长途贸易的混合经济
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy based on feudal landed production, supplemented by mining, royal monopolies, urban markets, and regional long-distance trade

source.zh: 城市缴纳、司法罚金与杂项
source.en: Urban payments, judicial fines, and miscellaneous income

category.zh: 宫廷、王室俸禄与行政开支
category.en: Court, royal stipends, and administrative costs

category.zh: 贵族补助、封赏与政治安抚
category.en: Noble subsidies, patronage, and political appeasement

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库状况较马加什一世晚期明显缩减，但在稳定年份仍能维持边防、宫廷和基本行政。真正的大规模战争仍需额外征税、借贷或贵族动员支持。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was notably smaller than in the late reign of Matthias Corvinus, but in stable years it could still support frontier defense, the court, and basic administration. Major war, however, still required extraordinary taxation, borrowing, or noble backing.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策偏保守，以维持边防与贵族妥协为核心，避免过度挑战等级特权；因此国家长期收入基础不如15世纪后期强大。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was relatively conservative, centered on sustaining the frontier and compromise with the nobility while avoiding excessive challenges to estate privileges; as a result, the state's long-term revenue base was weaker than in the late fifteenth century.

description.zh: 驻守南部边境城堡与渡口，是抵御奥斯曼袭扰和进攻的第一线力量
description.en: Stationed in southern border fortresses and crossings, serving as the first line against Ottoman raids and offensives

description.zh: 由大贵族与中小贵族率领的封建骑兵，是战场机动与突击主力之一
description.en: Feudal cavalry led by magnates and lesser nobles, forming one of the main mobile and shock elements in the field

description.zh: 包括郡县征召兵、城镇步兵与临时集结部队，用于守城、支援和战时补充
description.en: Included county levies, town infantry, and temporary mustered troops used for garrisoning, support, and wartime reinforcement

description.zh: 负责城防火炮、攻城器械、火药供应与工事修筑，在要塞战中愈发重要
description.en: Handled defensive guns, siege equipment, powder supply, and fortification works, becoming increasingly important in fortress warfare

description.zh: 适合侦察、追击和边境机动作战，吸收了草原与边疆战争传统
description.en: Suited for reconnaissance, pursuit, and frontier mobility, drawing on steppe and borderland military traditions

commanderInChief.zh: 弗拉迪斯劳斯二世为名义最高统帅，实际作战多由王国大将、边防总督与各大贵族统领
commanderInChief.en: Vladislaus II was the nominal commander-in-chief, while actual operations were often directed by leading captains, frontier bans, and magnate commanders

technology.zh: 军队处于晚期中世纪向早期近代过渡阶段，广泛使用冷兵器、弩与火绳火器，并重视城堡防御、火炮和边防纵深体系。
technology.en: The military stood in the transition from the late medieval to early modern period, using traditional arms, crossbows, and early matchlock firearms while placing growing emphasis on fortifications, artillery, and a depth-based frontier system.

threats.zh: 最大威胁来自南方奥斯曼帝国，其持续军事压力迫使匈牙利维持昂贵边防体系；此外还需关注波希米亚、哈布斯堡势力与国内贵族派系的政治博弈。
threats.en: The greatest threat came from the Ottoman Empire to the south, whose sustained pressure forced Hungary to maintain an expensive frontier system; the kingdom also had to watch Bohemian affairs, Habsburg power, and internal noble factionalism.

populationDescription.zh: 王国人口约350万，分布于多瑙河流域、特兰西瓦尼亚、上匈牙利与南部边区，族群与语言构成高度多元，包括匈牙利人、斯拉夫人、罗马尼亚人、德意志人及其他社群。
populationDescription.en: The kingdom's population was about 3.5 million, spread across the Danube basin, Transylvania, Upper Hungary, and the southern borderlands. It was highly diverse in ethnicity and language, including Hungarians, Slavs, Romanians, Germans, and other communities.

socialClasses.zh: 社会阶层包括享有政治特权的贵族、高级与下级教士、城市市民、矿工与手工业者、自由或半自由边民以及占人口多数的农民。不同地区的农民义务与自由程度差异明显。
socialClasses.en: Social classes included politically privileged nobles, higher and lower clergy, urban burghers, miners and artisans, free or semi-free frontier settlers, and the peasantry that formed the majority of the population. Peasant obligations and degrees of freedom varied significantly by region.

allies.zh: 与波兰在雅盖隆王朝联系下保持亲近；与教廷及部分中欧基督教势力在反奥斯曼问题上存在合作
allies.en: It maintained close ties with Poland through the Jagiellonian dynasty and cooperated with the papacy and some Central European Christian powers on anti-Ottoman matters

enemies.zh: 首要敌手为奥斯曼帝国；与哈布斯堡家族在中欧王位与影响力问题上也存在潜在竞争
enemies.en: Its principal enemy was the Ottoman Empire; there was also latent rivalry with the Habsburgs over thrones and influence in Central Europe

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以守住南部边境、维持中欧均势、通过王朝婚姻和等级政治保障王位稳定为主，同时寻求西方基督教世界对抗奥斯曼的财政与军事支持。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy focused on holding the southern frontier, maintaining the balance of power in Central Europe, securing dynastic stability through marriage and estate politics, and seeking fiscal and military support from the wider Christian West against the Ottomans.

keyInnovations.zh: 火炮与火药武器在攻守城中日益重要；采矿、冶金与铸币技术较发达；意大利文艺复兴建筑样式、拉丁文书行政和印刷文化开始更广泛传播。
keyInnovations.en: Artillery and gunpowder weapons were becoming increasingly important in siege and fortress warfare; mining, metallurgy, and minting were relatively advanced; Italian Renaissance architectural forms, Latin documentary administration, and print culture were spreading more widely.

strengths.zh: 地处中欧要冲，农业与矿业基础扎实，贵族骑兵传统强，边防要塞网络成熟，并具有连接巴尔干、德意志与波兰地区的战略与贸易价值。
strengths.en: It occupied a key position in Central Europe, had a solid agricultural and mining base, a strong noble cavalry tradition, a developed frontier fortress network, and major strategic and commercial value linking the Balkans, German lands, and Poland.

weaknesses.zh: 中央财政与王权较马加什一世时期削弱，贵族分权严重，常备军不足，国家动员依赖等级合作；面对奥斯曼长期高强度压力时容易暴露结构性脆弱。
weaknesses.en: Central finance and royal authority were weaker than under Matthias Corvinus, noble decentralization was severe, the standing army was insufficient, and state mobilization depended on estate cooperation; these structural weaknesses became dangerous under prolonged intense Ottoman pressure.

outlook.zh: 1500年前后的王国表面稳定，但这种稳定建立在脆弱的财政妥协与贵族平衡之上。若无法重建更强的中央军事与财政能力，未来数十年在奥斯曼持续扩张下将面临严峻考验。
outlook.en: Around 1500 the kingdom appeared stable, but that stability rested on fragile fiscal compromise and noble balance. Without rebuilding stronger central military and financial capacity, it would face severe tests in the coming decades under continuing Ottoman expansion.

description.zh: 匈牙利位于奥斯曼扩张前线，是中欧的重要边疆王国。
description.en: Hungary stood on the front line of Ottoman expansion and remained a key kingdom of Central Europe.

name.zh: 德意志文明（神圣罗马帝国）

governmentForm.zh: 选举君主制下的封建帝国，由皇帝、选侯、诸侯主教、世俗亲王、帝国骑士与自由帝国城市共同构成
governmentForm.en: An elective feudal empire composed of the emperor, prince-electors, prince-bishops, secular princes, imperial knights, and free imperial cities

socialStructure.zh: 社会高度等级化且地方差异显著，上层为帝国诸侯、教会领主和城市贵族，中层为骑士、行会师傅、商人和受教育神职人员，下层为农民、佃户、城镇工匠学徒与雇工
socialStructure.en: Society was highly stratified and regionally varied, with imperial princes, ecclesiastical lords, and urban patricians at the top; knights, guild masters, merchants, and educated clergy in the middle; and peasants, tenants, apprentices, and laborers at the bottom

rulingClass.zh: 哈布斯堡王室、七大选侯、诸侯、公爵、伯爵、主教侯与自由城市寡头
rulingClass.en: The Habsburg royal house, the seven prince-electors, territorial princes, dukes, counts, prince-bishops, and oligarchies of the free cities

succession.zh: 帝位原则上由选侯选举产生，哈布斯堡家族凭借领地、婚姻联盟与政治影响力持续主导皇位继承
succession.en: The imperial crown was in principle elective by the prince-electors, though the Habsburgs increasingly dominated succession through territorial power, marriage alliances, and political influence

structure.zh: 帝国政体分散，中央机构有限但正在改革。皇帝依靠宫廷顾问、帝国议会、帝国宫廷法院与各领地合作治理，地方权力主要掌握在数百个直属或半直属政治实体手中
structure.en: The imperial polity was decentralized, with limited central institutions undergoing reform. The emperor ruled through court advisers, the Imperial Diet, the Imperial Chamber Court, and cooperation with territorial estates, while most local power rested in hundreds of immediate or semi-immediate polities

name.zh: 皇帝宫廷与枢密顾问机构
name.en: Imperial Court and Privy Advisory Household

function.zh: 处理君主诏令、王朝外交、婚姻安排、封赐事务与高层行政协调
function.en: Handled royal decrees, dynastic diplomacy, marriage arrangements, feudal grants, and high-level administrative coordination

function.zh: 作为帝国等级会议，讨论税赋、战争、和平、帝国法令与各等级之间的争端调解
function.en: Served as the assembly of imperial estates, deliberating taxation, war, peace, imperial ordinances, and mediation among the estates

function.zh: 审理帝国内部领主、城市与臣民之间的重要司法案件，尤其涉及领地纠纷与破坏和平案件
function.en: Heard major judicial cases within the Empire, especially territorial disputes and breaches of the public peace among lords, cities, and subjects

name.zh: 哈布斯堡奥地利财政署

function.zh: 管理奥地利世袭领地税收、矿山收入、借贷与军费筹措，是皇帝最可直接支配的财政基础
function.en: Managed taxation, mining revenues, borrowing, and military finance in the Austrian hereditary lands, forming the emperor's most direct fiscal base

function.zh: 起草敕令、保存封建契据、管理外交文书和法律文件
function.en: Drafted edicts, preserved feudal charters, and managed diplomatic and legal documentation

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政极度多元，选侯国、公国、伯国、主教领、修道院领地和自由城市各有自己的法庭、税制与官僚系统；皇帝对奥地利世袭领地的控制远强于对整个帝国的直接控制
localAdmin.en: Local administration was extremely diverse: electorates, duchies, counties, bishoprics, abbey territories, and free cities each maintained their own courts, taxes, and bureaucracies; the emperor exercised far stronger authority in the Austrian hereditary lands than across the Empire as a whole

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为罗马法复兴、德意志习惯法、封建法与教会法并存。1495年帝国改革后强调“永久和平”，并以帝国宫廷法院作为跨领地争端的裁判机构
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined revived Roman law, German customary law, feudal law, and canon law. After the Imperial Reform of 1495, greater emphasis was placed on the Eternal Public Peace, with the Imperial Chamber Court acting as an arbiter in inter-territorial disputes

taxationSystem.zh: 税收缺乏统一性。帝国层面主要依赖经议会同意征收的共同税如“普通便士”以及临时军费摊派；各领地则征收地租、通行税、城市消费税、矿税、盐税和封建义务
taxationSystem.en: Taxation lacked uniformity. At the imperial level it depended mainly on common taxes approved by the Diet, such as the Common Penny, and temporary military assessments; individual territories levied rents, tolls, urban excises, mining dues, salt taxes, and feudal obligations

religion.zh: 以拉丁基督教中的罗马天主教为主，修道院、主教区、圣徒崇拜与礼仪历法深刻塑造社会生活；晚期中世纪的改革呼声和虔信运动也日益明显
religion.en: Roman Catholicism within Latin Christendom predominated, with monasteries, bishoprics, saintly cults, and the liturgical calendar deeply shaping social life; late medieval calls for reform and currents of personal devotion were also increasingly visible

philosophy.zh: 经院哲学仍具制度影响力，但文艺复兴人文主义正在大学、宫廷和城市学者圈层中扩展，强调古典拉丁文献、历史批判与道德教化
philosophy.en: Scholasticism retained institutional influence, but Renaissance humanism was spreading through universities, courts, and urban scholarly circles, emphasizing classical Latin literature, historical criticism, and moral cultivation

writingSystem.zh: 主要使用拉丁字母；行政、法律和学术场合广泛使用拉丁文，地方治理、商业和文学则多用早期新高地德语及其他地方德语书写形式
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used throughout; Latin dominated administration, law, and scholarship, while Early New High German and other regional German written forms were common in local governance, commerce, and literature

culturalAchievements.zh: 印刷业高度发达，纽伦堡、奥格斯堡等城市成为出版与艺术中心；木刻版画、祭坛画、城市编年史、骑士文学与人文主义学术繁荣。丢勒等艺术家代表了德语地区文艺复兴视觉文化的成熟
culturalAchievements.en: Printing was highly developed, and cities such as Nuremberg and Augsburg became centers of publishing and art; woodcuts, altarpieces, urban chronicles, chivalric literature, and humanist scholarship flourished. Artists such as Dürer represented the maturity of Renaissance visual culture in the German lands

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系日耳曼语族，以高地德语、低地德语及多种地方方言为主，并与拉丁语长期并行
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Germanic branch, dominated by High German, Low German, and numerous regional dialects, alongside the long-standing use of Latin

gdpDescription.zh: 帝国经济总量居欧洲前列，但内部差异极大。莱茵河流域、南德意志城市和萨克森矿区最为富庶，阿尔卑斯山区和东部边缘地区较为贫弱。总体上是以农业为基础、以城市手工业和区域贸易网络为支撑的复合经济
gdpDescription.en: The Empire ranked among Europe's largest economies, though internal disparities were great. The Rhineland, South German cities, and Saxon mining districts were especially prosperous, while alpine and eastern frontier regions were poorer. Overall it was a composite economy based on agriculture and sustained by urban crafts and regional trade networks

mainIndustries.zh: 粮食种植、葡萄酒、畜牧、纺织、金属冶炼、银铜采矿、兵器制造、印刷、造纸、酿酒、盐业与长途商贸
mainIndustries.en: Grain cultivation, wine production, livestock raising, textiles, metalworking, silver and copper mining, arms manufacture, printing, papermaking, brewing, salt production, and long-distance trade

tradeGoods.zh: 银、铜、铁制品、兵器、布匹、亚麻、葡萄酒、啤酒、盐、皮革、纸张、印刷书籍、木材和奢侈工艺品
tradeGoods.en: Silver, copper, iron goods, weapons, cloth, linen, wine, beer, salt, leather, paper, printed books, timber, and luxury crafts

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富分布极不均衡。自由城市商人、矿业资本家、放贷家族与高级教士积累了显著财富，而普通农户多拥有有限耕地、牲畜和简陋器具，并负担地租、什一税及劳役
householdWealth.en: Household wealth was highly unequal. Merchants in free cities, mining financiers, lending families, and senior clergy amassed notable fortunes, while ordinary peasant households typically possessed limited land, livestock, and simple tools and bore rents, tithes, and labor dues

economicSystem.zh: 以封建地租和庄园经济为基础，结合城市行会制度、区域市场、矿业资本和跨阿尔卑斯及莱茵商路的混合型经济体系
economicSystem.en: A mixed economic system built on feudal rents and manorial agriculture, combined with urban guild structures, regional markets, mining capital, and transalpine and Rhine trade routes

source.zh: 奥地利世袭领地税收与地租
source.en: Taxes and rents from the Austrian hereditary lands

source.zh: 帝国议会批准的援助金与摊派
source.en: Aids and assessments approved by the Imperial Diet

source.zh: 借贷、封赐费与杂项收入
source.en: Loans, feudal fees, and miscellaneous income

category.zh: 宫廷、外交与王朝婚姻政治
category.en: Court, diplomacy, and dynastic marriage politics

category.zh: 馈赠、补贴与宗教机构支持
category.en: Patronage, subsidies, and support for religious institutions

treasuryDescription.zh: 帝国与哈布斯堡王朝财政并不完全分离，现金储备有限，常依赖富格尔等金融家提供预支贷款。财政状况在和平时期可维持稳定，但一旦发生对奥斯曼作战或重大选举政治运作，压力会迅速上升
treasuryDescription.en: Imperial and Habsburg dynastic finances were not fully separate, and cash reserves were limited, often relying on advances from financiers such as the Fuggers. Fiscal conditions could remain stable in peacetime but came under rapid strain during wars against the Ottomans or major electoral political campaigns

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策以维持信用、争取诸侯拨款、扩大世袭领地收入和审慎借贷为核心，优先保障边防军费与王朝外交支出
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy centered on maintaining credit, securing contributions from the princes, increasing income from hereditary lands, and borrowing cautiously, with priority given to frontier defense and dynastic diplomacy

name.zh: 诸侯封建骑兵与重装骑士
name.en: Princely Feudal Cavalry and Armored Knights

description.zh: 由诸侯、骑士阶层及其随从构成，仍具威望，但在战场上的决定性作用相较前世纪下降
description.en: Drawn from princes, the knightly class, and their retainers; still prestigious, though less decisive on the battlefield than in earlier centuries

name.zh: 德意志步兵与邦国征募兵

description.zh: 包括长矛兵、戟兵、弩手和早期火绳枪兵，是帝国各邦国提供的主要兵力来源
description.en: Included pikemen, halberdiers, crossbowmen, and early arquebusiers and formed the main manpower pool supplied by imperial territories

description.zh: 装备长枪、双手剑和火器的职业步兵，机动性强、作战经验丰富，是马克西米连一世军事改革的重要成果
description.en: Professional infantry equipped with pikes, two-handed swords, and firearms; mobile and battle-hardened, they were a major product of Maximilian's military reforms

description.zh: 由铜铁火炮、炮手、工兵和运输人员组成，在围城战和防御作战中越来越关键
description.en: Consisted of bronze and iron guns, gunners, engineers, and transport crews, and was becoming increasingly crucial in siege warfare and defense

name.zh: 边境守备队与城市民兵

description.zh: 驻守东南边境要塞与帝国城市，由地方资助，平时维持治安与防御
description.en: Stationed in southeastern frontier fortresses and imperial cities, funded locally, and responsible in peacetime for security and defense

commanderInChief.zh: 马克西米连一世兼任最高统帅，各邦国将领与宫廷军事顾问分掌实际指挥
commanderInChief.en: Maximilian I served as supreme commander, while territorial captains and court military advisers exercised practical command

technology.zh: 处于冷兵器与火器并用的过渡阶段，长枪方阵、火绳枪、野战炮和星形工事雏形逐步扩展；军队组织日益职业化，但后勤和统一指挥仍受帝国分权结构限制
technology.en: Military technology was in a transitional stage combining traditional arms and firearms, with pike formations, arquebuses, field artillery, and early forms of trace-based fortification spreading; armies were becoming more professional, though logistics and unified command remained constrained by imperial decentralization

threats.zh: 主要外部威胁来自奥斯曼帝国在多瑙河中下游的扩张，以及法国在意大利和西部边境的竞争；内部则存在诸侯不合作、城市与领主冲突及帝国执行力不足的问题
threats.en: The main external threats came from Ottoman expansion in the middle and lower Danube and from French rivalry in Italy and along the western frontier; internally, the Empire faced princely non-cooperation, conflicts between cities and lords, and weak enforcement capacity

populationDescription.zh: 人口规模居欧洲最大政治共同体之一，但分布极不均衡，莱茵河谷、上德意志、波希米亚周边和尼德兰地区人口密度较高，阿尔卑斯高地和边疆山地较为稀疏
populationDescription.en: Its population made it one of Europe's largest political communities, though settlement was uneven, with denser concentrations in the Rhine Valley, Upper Germany, regions around Bohemia, and the Low Countries, and thinner settlement in alpine uplands and frontier mountain zones

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会阶层包括高等贵族与诸侯、教士、骑士与低级贵族、城市贵族与富商、行会手工业者、自由农民、依附农与农奴，以及城市贫民和流动佣工
socialClasses.en: The main social classes included high nobility and princes, clergy, knights and lesser nobles, urban patricians and wealthy merchants, guild artisans, free peasants, dependent peasants and serfs, as well as the urban poor and itinerant wage laborers

allies.zh: 主要依靠哈布斯堡王朝联姻网络，与西班牙哈布斯堡、部分意大利邦国、英格兰及若干中欧天主教领主保持阶段性合作
allies.en: It relied primarily on the Habsburg marriage network, maintaining periodic cooperation with the Spanish Habsburg connection, certain Italian states, England, and various Central European Catholic lords

enemies.zh: 主要对手为法国王国与奥斯曼帝国；此外在意大利问题上也与威尼斯及若干地方势力存在利益冲突
enemies.en: Its principal adversaries were the Kingdom of France and the Ottoman Empire; it also had conflicts of interest with Venice and other local powers over Italian affairs

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交以王朝联姻、维持帝国内部团结、遏制法国在意大利与勃艮第方向的扩张，并加强多瑙河防线对抗奥斯曼推进为核心
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on dynastic marriages, preserving internal imperial cohesion, checking French expansion in Italy and the Burgundian sphere, and strengthening the Danubian frontier against Ottoman advance

era.zh: 文艺复兴时期晚期中世纪向近代早期过渡阶段
era.en: Renaissance era, in transition from the late medieval world to the early modern age

keyInnovations.zh: 活字印刷的成熟扩散、采矿与冶金技术改进、火器与野战炮普及、机械钟表制造、地图绘制提升，以及大学法学与行政文书技术的制度化发展
keyInnovations.en: Key innovations included the mature spread of movable-type printing, improvements in mining and metallurgy, wider use of firearms and field artillery, mechanical clockmaking, advances in cartography, and the institutional development of university-trained law and documentary administration

strengths.zh: 人口众多、经济基础雄厚、城市网络密集、矿产资源丰富、金融家和印刷业发达，并拥有哈布斯堡王朝跨区域联姻带来的外交优势
strengths.en: Its strengths were a large population, strong economic foundations, dense urban networks, abundant mineral resources, advanced financiers and printing, and the diplomatic advantages created by the Habsburg transregional marriage strategy

weaknesses.zh: 最大弱点是政治碎片化、皇权财政薄弱、帝国法令执行困难、诸侯利益分散，以及对佣兵和信贷的高度依赖
weaknesses.en: Its greatest weaknesses were political fragmentation, weak central finances, difficulty enforcing imperial law, divergent princely interests, and heavy dependence on mercenaries and credit

outlook.zh: 1500年前后的帝国总体稳定且具潜力，若能继续推进帝国改革并协调诸侯合作，仍可保持欧洲核心强权地位；但宗教改革前夜的思想动荡、财政紧张与外部战争压力，预示未来数十年将面临深刻挑战
outlook.en: Around 1500 the Empire was broadly stable and full of potential; if imperial reforms continued and princely cooperation could be managed, it could remain a central European great power. Yet the intellectual unrest on the eve of the Reformation, fiscal strain, and pressure from external wars pointed to profound challenges in the decades ahead

description.zh: 神圣罗马帝国由众多诸侯邦、主教区与自由市组成，政治高度分散。
description.en: The Holy Roman Empire was a highly decentralized polity of princes, bishoprics, and free cities.

name.zh: 波兰—立陶宛联邦前联合体
中东欧基督教文明（波兰-立陶宛雅盖隆联合）
name.en: Central-Eastern European Christian Civilization (Jagiellonian Polish-Lithuanian Union)

rulerTitle.zh: 波兰国王、立陶宛最高公爵
rulerTitle.en: King of Poland and Grand Duke of Lithuania

governmentForm.zh: 以君主制为核心、由王国与大公国构成的王朝联合与贵族协商政体
governmentForm.en: A dynastic union centered on monarchy, combining kingdom and grand duchy within a noble consultative polity

socialStructure.zh: 社会由国王、主教与高级世俗贵族、中小什拉赫塔贵族、城市市民、自由农民与农奴、边疆军役阶层及少数民族社群构成。波兰本部贵族政治影响力较强，立陶宛与鲁塞尼亚地区则保有更强的地方贵族与习惯法传统。
socialStructure.en: Society was structured around the king, bishops and magnates, lesser szlachta nobles, urban burghers, free peasants and serfs, frontier military groups, and minority communities. In the Polish core lands noble politics was especially strong, while Lithuania and the Ruthenian lands retained stronger regional aristocratic and customary traditions.

rulingClass.zh: 天主教高级贵族、主教团、王室官僚与地方什拉赫塔贵族
rulingClass.en: Catholic magnates, the episcopate, royal officials, and the regional szlachta nobility

succession.zh: 雅盖隆王朝的世袭继承为原则，但需贵族与重要政治共同体承认；波兰王位越来越依赖贵族同意，立陶宛大公位则与王朝安排紧密相连。
succession.en: Succession was in principle dynastic within the Jagiellonians, but required recognition by the nobility and major political bodies; the Polish crown increasingly depended on noble consent, while the Lithuanian grand ducal title remained closely tied to dynastic arrangement.

structure.zh: 国家由波兰王国与立陶宛大公国组成，在君主统一下分别保有部分法律、官职与财政传统。中央权力通过王室议事、王国大臣、宫廷文书系统和地方总督实施，并由地区议会和全国性贵族会议加以制衡。
structure.en: The state consisted of the Kingdom of Poland and the Grand Duchy of Lithuania, united under one monarch while preserving parts of their own legal, office-holding, and fiscal traditions. Central authority operated through royal councils, crown ministers, chancery administration, and provincial governors, balanced by regional diets and wider noble assemblies.

function.zh: 负责重大政务、外交、战争决策、王室任命与全国协调，是君主最重要的咨询机构。
function.en: Handled major affairs of state, diplomacy, war decisions, royal appointments, and overall coordination as the monarch's principal advisory body.

function.zh: 负责敕令起草、印玺保管、条约与法令登记、地方文书往来和行政档案管理。
function.en: Drafted royal decrees, kept seals, registered treaties and laws, managed correspondence with the provinces, and maintained administrative records.

function.zh: 征收王室收入、关税、铸币收益与特别战争税，管理财政拨款和债务。
function.en: Collected royal income, customs, mint revenues, and extraordinary war taxes, while managing allocations and debt.

name.zh: 王国与大公国司法机构
name.en: Crown and Grand Ducal Judicial Institutions

function.zh: 处理贵族诉讼、土地争议、王室法庭事务及上诉，协调成文法与习惯法。
function.en: Handled noble litigation, land disputes, crown court business, and appeals, coordinating written law with customary law.

name.zh: 地方行政与省总督系统

function.zh: 通过总督、省长、城堡长官和县级官员管理地方秩序、征收、征兵与司法执行。
function.en: Administered local order, collection, levies, and judicial enforcement through voivodes, starostas, castellans, and county officials.

localAdmin.zh: 地方治理以省、县、城堡辖区和自治城市为基础。波兰地区由总督、城堡长官与地方议会共同运作；立陶宛与鲁塞尼亚地区则更多依赖地方贵族、总督和旧有鲁塞尼亚行政传统。许多城市依据马格德堡法享有自治。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was based on provinces, counties, castle districts, and self-governing towns. In Poland it operated through voivodes, starostas, and local diets; in Lithuania and Ruthenia it relied more heavily on regional nobles, governors, and inherited Ruthenian administrative traditions. Many towns enjoyed self-government under Magdeburg law.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系兼具成文法、王室法令、教会法、地方习惯法与城市法。波兰王国延续王国法和贵族特权文书，立陶宛则在习惯法和鲁塞尼亚文书实践基础上向更系统化法典发展。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined written law, royal decrees, canon law, local custom, and municipal law. The Kingdom of Poland continued under crown law and noble privilege charters, while Lithuania developed toward more systematic codification on the basis of customary and Ruthenian legal practice.

taxationSystem.zh: 财政依赖王室领地收入、盐矿与铸币收益、边境关税、城市税以及经议会同意征收的非常税。贵族在常规直接税上享有广泛豁免，因此国家财政能力常取决于战争时期贵族是否批准额外赋税。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation relied on crown domain income, salt mines and mint revenues, frontier customs, urban taxes, and extraordinary levies approved by the diets. Since nobles enjoyed broad exemption from regular direct taxation, state fiscal capacity often depended on whether the nobility granted additional taxes in wartime.

religion.zh: 以拉丁天主教为统治核心宗教，同时包含大量东正教鲁塞尼亚臣民，并有犹太社群、亚美尼亚商人社群及少数穆斯林鞑靼人口。宗教多元在边疆地区尤为明显。
religion.en: Latin Catholicism formed the core religion of rule, alongside large Orthodox Ruthenian populations, Jewish communities, Armenian merchant groups, and small Muslim Tatar communities. Religious pluralism was especially visible in the frontier regions.

philosophy.zh: 思想上结合经院神学、拉丁基督教王权观、早期人文主义与贵族自由传统。克拉科夫大学推动天文学、法学、修辞学和神学研究，意大利文艺复兴影响正在加强。
philosophy.en: Intellectual life combined scholastic theology, Latin Christian ideas of monarchy, early humanism, and traditions of noble liberty. The University of Kraków promoted astronomy, law, rhetoric, and theology, while Italian Renaissance influence was growing.

writingSystem.zh: 官方和学术文书大量使用拉丁文；波兰语在王国内日益重要；立陶宛与鲁塞尼亚事务中广泛使用鲁塞尼亚文书语，以拉丁字母和西里尔传统并存。
writingSystem.en: Latin was widely used in official and scholarly writing; Polish was becoming increasingly important within the kingdom; Lithuanian and Ruthenian affairs made broad use of the Ruthenian chancery language, with Latin alphabet and Cyrillic traditions coexisting.

culturalAchievements.zh: 克拉科夫大学为中欧重要学术中心，培养了法学家、神学家与天文学家。晚期哥特与早期文艺复兴艺术在教堂、城堡和墓葬雕刻中融合发展；编年史传统、宗教文学、王室赞助的建筑和城市自治文化共同塑造了联合体的高等文化。
culturalAchievements.en: The University of Kraków stood as a major intellectual center of Central Europe, training jurists, theologians, and astronomers. Late Gothic and early Renaissance art developed together in churches, castles, and funerary sculpture; chronicles, religious literature, royally sponsored architecture, and urban self-governing culture together shaped the union's high culture.

languageFamily.zh: 以西斯拉夫语支的波兰语、东斯拉夫书面鲁塞尼亚语、波罗的语支的立陶宛语和学术拉丁语共同构成多语言文明空间。
languageFamily.en: A multilingual civilizational space combining Polish of the West Slavic family, written Ruthenian of the East Slavic sphere, Lithuanian of the Baltic family, and scholarly Latin.

unit.zh: 1490年代末至1500年前后国际元（1990年盖瑞-科哈姆斯）
1490年代末至1500年前后国际元（1990年盖瑞-科哈姆斯）

gdpDescription.zh: 经济以农业为主，但在东中欧属于规模庞大且整合度较高的复合经济体。维斯瓦河流域的谷物出口、盐业、畜牧、森林资源、琥珀与毛皮贸易，以及克拉科夫、格但斯克、维尔纽斯和利沃夫等城市市场网络，共同支撑了其大国地位。
gdpDescription.en: The economy was predominantly agrarian, yet within East-Central Europe it was a large and relatively integrated composite economy. Grain exports from the Vistula basin, salt production, livestock, forest resources, amber and fur trade, and the urban market networks of Kraków, Gdańsk, Vilnius, and Lwów together underpinned its great-power status.

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物种植、畜牧、盐矿开采、木材与焦油、蜂蜜与蜡、毛皮与皮革、酿酒、金属手工业、琥珀加工、河运与区域转口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Grain cultivation, livestock raising, salt mining, timber and tar, honey and wax, furs and leather, brewing, metal crafts, amber processing, river transport, and regional entrepôt trade

tradeGoods.zh: 出口谷物、木材、灰烬、焦油、蜂蜡、皮革、毛皮、牛只与盐；进口布匹、奢侈品、金属制成品、香料、葡萄酒、纸张和意大利艺术品
tradeGoods.en: Exported grain, timber, ash, tar, beeswax, leather, furs, cattle, and salt; imported cloth, luxury goods, metal manufactures, spices, wine, paper, and Italian artworks

householdWealth.zh: 贵族家庭财富主要体现为土地、佃租、谷物余粮、磨坊、酒坊和司法权收益；城市富户持有房产、仓储、商贸资本与手工业作坊；多数农户财富低且受地租与劳役负担限制，但在较肥沃地区仍可保持基本自给并参与地方市场。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth among nobles lay chiefly in land, rents, grain surpluses, mills, breweries, and judicial rights; urban elites held property, warehouses, trading capital, and craft shops; most peasant households had limited wealth and were constrained by rents and labor services, though in more fertile districts they could still maintain subsistence and engage in local markets.

unit.zh: 1490年代末至1500年前后国际元（1990年盖瑞-科哈姆斯）
1490年代末至1500年前后国际元（1990年盖瑞-科哈姆斯）

economicSystem.zh: 经济体系是以庄园农业和贵族地产为基础、由城市自治和长距离贸易补充的混合封建市场经济。国家干预有限，但通过关税、盐业垄断、铸币权和王室特许维持关键财政与商业节点。
economicSystem.en: The economic system was a mixed feudal-market order based on manor agriculture and noble estates, supplemented by urban self-government and long-distance trade. State intervention was limited, but customs, salt monopolies, minting rights, and royal charters sustained key fiscal and commercial nodes.

source.en: Crown domain and salt mine income

source.zh: 议会批准的非常税与战争税
source.en: Extraordinary and war taxes approved by the diets

source.zh: 城市税、司法罚金与铸币收益
source.en: Urban taxes, judicial fines, and mint revenues

source.zh: 附属领地、教会贡献与杂项收入
source.en: Dependent lands, ecclesiastical contributions, and miscellaneous income

category.zh: 司法、教会事务与公共工程
category.en: Justice, ecclesiastical affairs, and public works

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库并非完全统一的现代中央金库，而是由王室现金、盐矿收入预期、地方储备、应收关税和可动员信贷共同构成。财政稳健但对贵族税收同意和战争形势较为敏感。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was not a fully unified modern central reserve, but a combination of royal cash, expected salt income, provincial reserves, receivable customs, and mobilizable credit. It was sound by regional standards but sensitive to noble tax consent and the fortunes of war.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体谨慎，平时维持低常税与王室收入平衡，战时依靠议会非常税、借贷和边境征收扩张军费。由于贵族特权强大，国家难以建立像西欧某些君主国那样稳定而高度集中化的税收国家。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy was broadly cautious, maintaining equilibrium through low ordinary taxation and royal revenues in peacetime, while wartime spending expanded through diet-approved extraordinary taxes, borrowing, and frontier collections. Because noble privileges were strong, the state struggled to build as stable and centralized a tax regime as some western monarchies.

name.zh: 王室常备骑兵与宫廷卫队

description.zh: 由王室直属骑兵、近卫与精锐军役部队组成，负责核心战场机动、护卫与快速反应。
description.en: Comprised crown cavalry, guards, and elite service troops for battlefield mobility, protection, and rapid response.

description.zh: 依封建与贵族义务动员，是波兰军事传统的核心力量，擅长冲击、侦察和机动作战。
description.en: Mobilized through feudal and noble obligation, this was the core of Polish military tradition, effective in shock action, reconnaissance, and maneuver warfare.

description.zh: 包括王室步兵、城市民兵、捷克和德意志雇佣兵等，负责守城、火器运用和阵地作战。
description.en: Included crown infantry, urban militia, and Czech and German mercenaries, serving in fortress defense, firearms deployment, and positional fighting.

name.zh: 立陶宛与鲁塞尼亚边疆军

description.zh: 主要部署于东部和南部边疆，对抗鞑靼袭扰和莫斯科方向威胁，重视骑射、巡逻与边境防御。
description.en: Primarily deployed on the eastern and southern frontiers against Tatar raids and Muscovite pressure, emphasizing mounted archery, patrol, and border defense.

description.zh: 负责城堡火炮、攻城器械、桥梁道路和补给设施维护，在防御战中重要性日增。
description.en: Handled fortress artillery, siege machinery, bridges, roads, and supply works, and was of growing importance in defensive warfare.

commanderInChief.zh: 国王扬一世·阿尔布雷赫特，辅以王国大元帅、立陶宛大元帅与各省总督
commanderInChief.en: King John I Albert, assisted by the Grand Crown Hetman-level commanders' predecessors, the Grand Marshal of the Crown, the Grand Marshal of Lithuania, and provincial governors

technology.zh: 军队处于冷兵器向火器混合转型阶段。重装与中装骑兵仍是主力，步兵火绳枪和野战炮数量有限但不断增加。边疆作战吸收了对抗草原骑兵的轻骑与机动经验，筑城和炮兵技术受德意志、波希米亚与意大利影响。
technology.en: The military was in a transition from predominantly cold steel to a mixed gunpowder system. Heavy and medium cavalry remained central, while matchlock infantry and field artillery were still limited but increasing. Frontier warfare incorporated light cavalry and mobile methods developed against steppe horsemen, while fortification and artillery techniques were influenced by German, Bohemian, and Italian models.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自南方与东南方的克里米亚鞑靼袭扰及其与奥斯曼体系的联系、东北方向莫斯科国家的扩张，以及摩尔达维亚和黑海通道争夺。西方边界相对较稳，但条顿遗产与德意志政治仍需警惕。
threats.en: The chief threats came from Crimean Tatar raids to the south and southeast and their connection to the Ottoman system, Muscovite expansion in the northeast, and struggles over Moldavia and Black Sea access. The western frontier was relatively stable, but the legacy of the Teutonic Order and German politics still required attention.

populationDescription.zh: 人口约八百万，涵盖波兰人、立陶宛人、鲁塞尼亚人、德意志城市居民、犹太人、亚美尼亚人、鞑靼人及其他边疆社群，是一个族群与宗教高度多样化的东中欧大国。
populationDescription.en: With about eight million inhabitants, the realm included Poles, Lithuanians, Ruthenians, German urban populations, Jews, Armenians, Tatars, and other frontier groups, making it a highly ethnically and religiously diverse East-Central European great power.

socialClasses.zh: 上层为王室、主教和大贵族；中层为中小贵族、城市富商、自治城市官员与受教育神职人员；下层为手工业者、城市平民、自由农民、佃农与农奴。犹太与亚美尼亚社群在商业、放贷和区域贸易中具有重要地位，边疆骑兵和服务贵族则构成特殊军事社会群体。
socialClasses.en: The upper strata consisted of the royal house, bishops, and magnates; the middle strata of lesser nobles, wealthy merchants, municipal officeholders, and educated clergy; and the lower strata of artisans, urban commoners, free peasants, tenants, and serfs. Jewish and Armenian communities played important roles in commerce, credit, and regional trade, while frontier cavalry and service nobility formed distinctive military social groups.

allies.zh: 与匈牙利和波希米亚的雅盖隆王朝联系提供潜在合作空间；与教廷及部分拉丁基督教国家维持宗教与外交纽带；在对抗条顿和莫斯科问题上可寻求波罗的海与中欧伙伴支持。
allies.en: Jagiellonian ties with Hungary and Bohemia provided avenues for cooperation; the realm maintained religious and diplomatic bonds with the papacy and other Latin Christian states; and in confronting the Teutonic legacy and Muscovy it could seek support from Baltic and Central European partners.

enemies.zh: 主要对手为莫斯科国家、克里米亚汗国及其背后的奥斯曼影响；在南方事务中与摩尔达维亚关系紧张，边疆冲突频繁。
enemies.en: Its principal rivals were Muscovy, the Crimean Khanate, and the broader Ottoman influence behind it; relations with Moldavia were tense in southern affairs, and frontier conflict was frequent.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交目标是维持雅盖隆王朝在中东欧的均势地位，守卫波罗的海和东部边疆通道，压制莫斯科扩张，遏制鞑靼袭扰，并通过婚姻、王朝网络和贵族协商来避免多线长期战争。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy aimed to preserve Jagiellonian balance-of-power status in East-Central Europe, secure Baltic and eastern frontier routes, restrain Muscovite expansion, contain Tatar raiding, and avoid prolonged multi-front war through marriage, dynastic networks, and noble consultation.

keyInnovations.zh: 印刷术在大学和教会环境中扩散；火炮与火绳枪逐渐纳入军队；河运、仓储和谷物出口网络更加成熟；建筑和艺术开始吸收意大利文艺复兴样式；学术上天文学、数学和法学在克拉科夫发展显著。
keyInnovations.en: Printing was spreading in university and ecclesiastical settings; artillery and matchlocks were gradually entering the armed forces; river transport, storage, and grain-export networks were becoming more mature; architecture and art were absorbing Italian Renaissance forms; and astronomy, mathematics, and law were developing notably in Kraków.

strengths.zh: 疆域辽阔、人口众多、粮食与森林资源丰富，拥有联通波罗的海、东欧平原和中欧的战略位置。贵族骑兵传统强大，多元文化有利于商贸与区域整合，雅盖隆王朝网络提升了国际影响力。
strengths.en: It possessed vast territory, a large population, and abundant grain and forest resources, together with a strategic position linking the Baltic, the East European plain, and Central Europe. Its noble cavalry tradition was formidable, cultural diversity favored trade and regional integration, and the Jagiellonian dynastic network enhanced international influence.

weaknesses.zh: 中央财政与常备军能力有限，国家过度依赖贵族同意。法律和行政具有联合体性质，区域差异大，东部与南部边疆防御成本高。宗教与族群多样虽带来活力，也可能在危机中加剧政治分裂。
weaknesses.en: Central fiscal and standing-military capacity remained limited, and the state depended heavily on noble consent. Law and administration retained a composite structure with strong regional variation, while defense of the eastern and southern frontiers was costly. Religious and ethnic diversity brought vitality but could also intensify political fragmentation in times of crisis.

outlook.zh: 1500年前后的联合体总体稳定，仍是东中欧首要强国之一。若能改革财政、强化边防并维持王朝合作，其地位可继续上升；若贵族特权进一步压制中央集权，面对莫斯科与奥斯曼体系压力时将愈发脆弱。
outlook.en: Around 1500 the union was broadly stable and remained one of the foremost powers of East-Central Europe. If it could reform finances, strengthen the frontier, and preserve dynastic cooperation, its position could continue to rise; if noble privilege further constrained central authority, it would become increasingly vulnerable to pressure from Muscovy and the Ottoman system.

description.zh: 雅盖隆治下的波兰与立陶宛联合体是东中欧的重要大国。
description.en: The Jagiellonian union of Poland and Lithuania was one of the principal great powers of east-central Europe.

governmentForm.zh: 晚期中世纪向早期近代过渡的世袭君主制，依托王室议会、财政法院与地方官体系治理全国
governmentForm.en: A hereditary monarchy in transition from the late medieval to early modern form, governing through the royal council, sovereign courts, and provincial officers

socialStructure.zh: 社会按传统三等级划分为教士、贵族与第三等级；但到1500年前后，王室官僚、城市精英、司法贵族与富裕农民的地位日益重要，形成更复杂的层级社会
socialStructure.en: Society was traditionally divided into clergy, nobility, and the Third Estate; by around 1500, however, royal officeholders, urban elites, robe nobles, and prosperous peasants were increasingly important, creating a more complex hierarchical order

rulingClass.zh: 瓦卢瓦王室、高级贵族、高级教士、巴黎高等法院法官与王室财政及行政官员
rulingClass.en: The Valois royal house, high nobility, senior clergy, magistrates of the Parlement of Paris, and royal fiscal and administrative officials

succession.zh: 遵循卡佩—瓦卢瓦传统的父系王位继承原则，依萨利克法排除女性直接继承王位
succession.en: Succession followed the Capetian-Valois patrilineal principle, with Salic Law excluding direct female inheritance of the crown

structure.zh: 中央政权以国王为核心，通过王室议会、秘书机构、财政法院、司法高院和行省代表实施统治。法兰西仍保留大量封建与地方特权，但王权在税收、司法和军事动员方面明显加强。
structure.en: Central authority revolved around the king, who ruled through the royal council, chancery and secretarial offices, fiscal chambers, sovereign courts, and provincial representatives. France still retained many feudal and local privileges, but royal power had grown markedly in taxation, justice, and military mobilization.

function.zh: 为国王提供外交、战争、司法与行政决策建议，并处理最重要的王国事务
function.en: Advised the king on diplomacy, war, justice, and administration, and handled the most important affairs of the realm

function.zh: 审计王室收入、监督地产与财政官员、核查税赋和国库收支
function.en: Audited royal revenues, supervised royal domains and fiscal officers, and reviewed taxation and treasury flows

function.zh: 作为最高司法与登记机构，审理重大案件并登记王室敕令
function.en: Served as the highest judicial and registration body, hearing major cases and registering royal edicts

function.zh: 征收直接税与间接税，管理借款、军费、薪饷和地方财政执行
function.en: Collected direct and indirect taxes and managed loans, military expenditure, salaries, and provincial fiscal execution

function.zh: 起草敕令、保管印玺、传达王命并管理官方文书
function.en: Drafted ordinances, guarded the seal, transmitted royal orders, and managed official documents

name.zh: 地方官与税务执行体系

function.zh: 由巴伊、塞内沙尔、普罗沃、税务承包人与其他地方官执行司法、治安与征税
function.en: Baillis, sénéchaux, prévôts, tax farmers, and other provincial officers carried out justice, policing, and tax collection

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政由巴伊辖区与塞内沙尔辖区构成，南北制度略有差异。王室通过地方长官、城市自治机构、领主法院与教会网络共同治理，但越来越多事务受国王任命官员监督。
localAdmin.en: Local administration was organized through bailliages and sénéchaussées, with some north-south variation. The crown governed through royal officers, urban municipal bodies, seigneurial courts, and church networks, though an increasing share of affairs was supervised by royal appointees.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系为罗马法、教会法、王室敕令与各地习惯法并行的复合结构。北方法兰西以习惯法为主，南部受罗马法影响更深；重大上诉多归巴黎高等法院等主权法院处理。
legalSystem.en: The legal system was a composite of Roman law, canon law, royal ordinances, and regional customary law. Northern France was dominated by customary law, while the south was more influenced by Roman law; major appeals commonly went to sovereign courts such as the Parlement of Paris.

taxationSystem.zh: 税制以直接税人头尾税为核心，并辅以盐税、消费税、关税和王室领地收入。战时财政需求推动常设征税制度延续，使法国在欧洲拥有较强的王室汲取能力。
taxationSystem.en: Taxation centered on the direct taille, supplemented by the gabelle on salt, excise duties, customs, and revenues from the royal domain. Wartime needs had sustained a system of regular taxation, giving the French crown comparatively strong extractive capacity in Europe.

religion.zh: 以拉丁基督教中的罗马天主教为绝对主导，国王自视为最基督教的君主，教会在教育、慈善、社会规范与政治合法性中占据核心地位
religion.en: Roman Catholicism within Latin Christianity was overwhelmingly dominant, and the king viewed himself as the Most Christian monarch; the Church held a central place in education, charity, social norms, and political legitimacy

philosophy.zh: 思想上融合经院传统、基督教人文主义与文艺复兴古典学。大学神学仍具权威，但宫廷与城市学者 increasingly重视拉丁修辞、历史写作与古典文本研究。
philosophy.en: Intellectual life blended scholastic tradition, Christian humanism, and Renaissance classicism. University theology remained authoritative, but courtly and urban scholars increasingly valued Latin rhetoric, historical writing, and the study of classical texts.

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母，行政、学术与教会广泛使用拉丁文，王室文书和文学创作则越来越多采用中古法语向近代法语过渡的书面形式
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used; Latin remained widespread in administration, scholarship, and the Church, while royal records and literature increasingly employed written French transitioning from Middle to Early Modern French

culturalAchievements.zh: 法国在哥特式传统后期与文艺复兴初期建筑、宫廷礼仪、编年史写作、宗教艺术、手抄本装饰和早期印刷方面成就显著。意大利战争也加速了法国接触文艺复兴艺术、军事工程与古典审美。
culturalAchievements.en: France achieved distinction in late Gothic and early Renaissance architecture, court ceremonial, chronicle writing, religious art, manuscript illumination, and early printing. The Italian Wars also accelerated French contact with Renaissance art, military engineering, and classical aesthetics.

languageFamily.zh: 印欧语系罗曼语族，以法语诸方言和奥克语区方言为主，此外布列塔尼语、巴斯克语、弗拉芒语等地区语言仍广泛存在
languageFamily.en: Indo-European, Romance branch, with French dialects and Occitan varieties predominant, while Breton, Basque, Flemish, and other regional languages also remained widely used

gdpDescription.zh: 1500年前后的法国是欧洲人口最多、农业最强的大国之一，经济基础以粮食生产、葡萄酒、畜牧、纺织和区域贸易为核心。经历百年战争破坏后的恢复已基本完成，北部与卢瓦尔河流域、巴黎盆地和部分南部地区呈现明显繁荣。
gdpDescription.en: Around 1500, France was one of Europe's most populous and agriculturally powerful states, with an economy centered on grain production, wine, livestock, textiles, and regional trade. Recovery from the devastation of the Hundred Years' War was largely complete, and northern France, the Loire basin, the Paris Basin, and parts of the south showed clear prosperity.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、葡萄酒酿造、羊毛与亚麻纺织、盐业、金属加工、皮革、建筑、河运和地方集市贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, wine production, wool and linen textiles, salt production, metalworking, leather, construction, river transport, and regional market trade

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、葡萄酒、盐、羊毛布、亚麻布、皮革、金属器具、木材、染料和奢侈品再分销商品
tradeGoods.en: Grain, wine, salt, woolens, linens, leather, metal goods, timber, dyestuffs, and redistributed luxury items

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异极大。贵族和高等教士掌握大量土地、地租与司法权；城市商人和司法官员积累货币财富；普通农户多持有有限土地、牲畜和农具，较易受歉收、税负和债务冲击。
householdWealth.en: Household wealth varied greatly. Nobles and high clergy controlled substantial land, rents, and judicial rights; urban merchants and judicial officeholders accumulated monetary wealth; ordinary peasant households usually possessed limited land, livestock, and tools and were vulnerable to bad harvests, taxation, and debt.

economicSystem.zh: 以农业地租和封建权利为基础、同时迅速货币化的混合经济。王室财政汲取、城市市场、行会生产、跨地区商路和金融借贷共同塑造了法国的晚中世纪—文艺复兴经济结构。
economicSystem.en: A mixed economy grounded in agrarian rents and feudal rights but increasingly monetized. Royal fiscal extraction, urban markets, guild production, interregional trade routes, and credit networks together shaped France's late medieval to Renaissance economic structure.

category.en: Military costs and the Italian Wars

treasuryDescription.zh: 法国国库并非现代意义上的统一现金储备，而是由可动用现金、税收预期、借贷能力和各类财政办公室控制的收入流构成。路易十二以较为节制和善于理财著称，但意大利战争使财政持续承压。
treasuryDescription.en: The French treasury was not a single modern cash reserve but a combination of available specie, expected tax receipts, borrowing capacity, and revenue streams controlled by various fiscal offices. Louis XII was known for relative frugality and financial competence, but the Italian Wars kept the finances under strain.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策总体上以维持常备军和对意大利的远征为优先，依赖持续征收尾税、强化盐税与动员信贷。国王试图在不激化国内抵抗的前提下提高征收效率，并以节俭形象巩固统治。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy prioritized maintenance of the standing military and expeditions into Italy, relying on continued taille collection, enforcement of the gabelle, and mobilization of credit. The king sought to improve collection efficiency without provoking excessive domestic resistance, while cultivating an image of frugality.

name.zh: 王室骑兵与重装贵族骑士
name.en: Royal cavalry and heavily armed noble horse

description.zh: 包括王室直属骑兵、宪兵骑兵和贵族武装，是法国野战军的突击核心，装甲精良、冲击力强
description.en: Included royal cavalry, gendarmes, and noble mounted forces, forming the shock core of the French field army, well armored and powerful in charge

description.zh: 由地方征募步兵、城镇民兵和部分常设部队组成，装备长柄武器、弩和早期火器，用于守城、围城与阵地作战
description.en: Composed of locally raised infantry, town militia, and some permanent troops, equipped with polearms, crossbows, and early firearms for garrison, siege, and positional warfare

name.zh: 瑞士与德意志雇佣步兵

description.zh: 在意大利战争中极为重要，擅长密集长枪阵，是法国在阿尔卑斯以南作战的关键战力
description.en: Extremely important in the Italian Wars, skilled in dense pike formations and crucial to French operations south of the Alps

description.zh: 法国拥有欧洲最先进的攻城炮兵之一，机动性和铸炮技术突出，在攻取意大利要塞时尤具优势
description.en: France possessed one of Europe's most advanced siege artilleries, notable for mobility and gun founding, especially effective against Italian fortresses

description.zh: 驻守边境、城堡和关键城市，负责治安、边防和战时增援
description.en: Stationed in border zones, castles, and key towns, responsible for security, frontier defense, and wartime reinforcement

commanderInChief.zh: 路易十二国王
commanderInChief.en: King Louis XII

technology.zh: 法国军队处于火药时代早期的欧洲前列，重视野战炮和攻城炮、骑兵冲击、瑞士长枪雇佣军协同，以及不断改进的后勤和围城技术
technology.en: The French military ranked among Europe's leaders in the early gunpowder age, emphasizing field and siege artillery, cavalry shock action, coordination with Swiss pikemen, and improving logistics and siegecraft

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自意大利战争中的西班牙势力、神圣罗马帝国诸侯与意大利诸邦联盟，同时英格兰仍是潜在战略对手；国内则需防范地方贵族、财政疲敝与边疆守备不足。
threats.en: The main threats came from Spanish forces, princes of the Holy Roman Empire, and shifting coalitions of Italian states in the Italian Wars, while England remained a potential strategic rival; domestically the crown also had to guard against regional nobles, fiscal exhaustion, and insufficient frontier defense.

populationDescription.zh: 法国是1500年前后欧洲人口最多的王国之一。百年战争后的恢复、耕地重建和农业扩张支撑了人口增长，但地区之间仍存在战争创伤、瘟疫余波与生产力差异。
populationDescription.en: France was one of the most populous kingdoms in Europe around 1500. Recovery after the Hundred Years' War, the rebuilding of cultivation, and agricultural expansion supported demographic growth, though regional differences in war damage, plague aftereffects, and productivity remained significant.

socialClasses.zh: 人口主体为农民，包括自耕农、佃农和依附于领主权利体系的农村住民。其上为城市工匠、商人、律师和王室官员；再上为教士与贵族。贵族内部也分为大贵族、地方绅士和新兴司法贵族。
socialClasses.en: The majority of the population consisted of peasants, including owner-cultivators, tenants, and rural inhabitants subject to seigneurial rights. Above them stood urban craftsmen, merchants, lawyers, and royal officials; above these were clergy and nobility. The nobility itself was divided among great lords, local gentlemen, and an emerging robe nobility.

allies.zh: 法国的同盟关系高度流动，常与威尼斯、苏格兰及部分意大利和德意志势力结盟，以制衡阿拉贡、西班牙和哈布斯堡力量
allies.en: French alliances were highly fluid, often involving Venice, Scotland, and selected Italian and German powers to balance Aragon, Spain, and Habsburg influence

enemies.zh: 主要敌手是阿拉贡—西班牙势力、米兰和那不勒斯问题上的竞争者，以及在意大利与边境事务中对立的哈布斯堡相关力量；英格兰在战略上仍具敌意传统
enemies.en: Its principal enemies were the Aragonese-Spanish powers, rivals over Milan and Naples, and Habsburg-associated forces opposed to France in Italy and along its frontiers; England also remained strategically hostile by tradition

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以强化王权声望、主张对米兰和那不勒斯的权利、扩大在意大利的影响力并防止英西夹击为核心。法国通过婚姻、条约、雇佣军合同和战争行动追求欧洲霸权地位。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on enhancing royal prestige, asserting claims to Milan and Naples, expanding influence in Italy, and preventing encirclement by England and Spain. France pursued a leading European position through marriage, treaties, mercenary contracts, and warfare.

era.zh: 文艺复兴早期与火药时代初期
era.en: Early Renaissance and early gunpowder age

keyInnovations.zh: 关键技术与制度优势包括改良攻城炮兵、青铜火炮铸造、军事工程、印刷传播、会计和财政记录改进、城市工艺生产，以及从意大利吸收的文艺复兴建筑与艺术技法
keyInnovations.en: Key technologies and institutional strengths included improved siege artillery, bronze gun founding, military engineering, the spread of printing, advances in accounting and fiscal record keeping, urban craft production, and Renaissance architectural and artistic techniques absorbed from Italy

strengths.zh: 法国拥有庞大人口、广阔农业腹地、强于多数邻国的王室征税能力、发达炮兵、重要城市网络和日益整合的中央政权，是1500年欧洲最有潜力的强国之一。
strengths.en: France possessed a vast population, broad agricultural heartlands, stronger royal taxation capacity than most neighbors, advanced artillery, major urban networks, and an increasingly integrated central government, making it one of Europe's most formidable powers in 1500.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于地方特权顽强、财政对战争高度敏感、贵族与雇佣军成本高昂、法律和行政制度不统一，以及对意大利冒险的后勤与外交风险巨大。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in resilient local privileges, finances highly sensitive to war, the high cost of nobles and mercenaries, legal and administrative unevenness, and the enormous logistical and diplomatic risks of intervention in Italy.

outlook.zh: 短期内法国将继续繁荣并在意大利积极扩张，但也会因长期战争与哈布斯堡—西班牙竞争而面临更大财政压力。若王权继续巩固税收与司法体系，法国有望在16世纪成长为西欧最强大的王国之一。
outlook.en: In the short term, France was likely to remain prosperous and continue active expansion in Italy, but it would also face mounting fiscal pressure from prolonged war and Habsburg-Spanish rivalry. If the crown continued to consolidate taxation and justice, France was well placed to become one of the most powerful kingdoms in Western Europe during the 16th century.

description.zh: 法国在百年战争后恢复国力，并积极介入意大利战争。
description.en: France had recovered after the Hundred Years' War and was actively intervening in the Italian Wars.

governmentForm.zh: 以苏丹为中心的伊斯兰君主制与军事官僚帝国，结合宫廷、奴隶官僚体系与省级封地制度
governmentForm.en: A sultan-centered Islamic monarchy and military-bureaucratic empire, combining palace rule, slave-administrative institutions, and a provincial timar system

socialStructure.zh: 社会大体分为统治军政阶层与纳税臣民两大类。统治层包括宫廷奴隶出身官员、乌理玛、军人和省级总督；臣民则由穆斯林农民、基督徒与犹太社群、城市手工业者、商人及部族人口组成。
socialStructure.en: Society was broadly divided between the ruling military-administrative class and the tax-paying subjects. The ruling stratum included palace-trained slave officials, ulema, soldiers, and provincial governors; the subjects included Muslim peasants, Christian and Jewish communities, urban artisans, merchants, and tribal populations.

rulingClass.zh: 奥斯曼统治阶层主要由苏丹家族、迪万高官、耶尼切里上层、乌理玛与持有采邑的骑兵精英构成
rulingClass.en: The Ottoman ruling class consisted chiefly of the sultan’s household, high divan officials, senior Janissaries, the ulema, and timar-holding cavalry elites

succession.zh: 王朝世袭，但未完全固定长子继承；苏丹诸子竞争继位，由实际掌权与宫廷支持决定
succession.en: Dynastic hereditary succession, though not fully fixed by primogeniture; succession among the sultan’s sons was decided by political struggle and court support

structure.zh: 中央由苏丹统领，帝国政务通过帝国迪万处理，大维齐尔主持日常行政。中央下设财政、文书、司法宗教与军务体系；地方则分为贝勒贝伊辖区、桑贾克与更基层单位，由总督、法官和税务官共同管理。
structure.en: The center was headed by the sultan, with imperial affairs handled through the Imperial Divan and day-to-day administration directed by the grand vizier. The central government included fiscal, chancery, judicial-religious, and military branches; locally, the empire was divided into beylerbeyliks, sanjaks, and lower districts administered by governors, judges, and tax officials.

function.zh: 处理帝国最高行政、军务与外交事务，汇总奏报并向苏丹呈递决策
function.en: Handled the empire’s highest administrative, military, and diplomatic affairs, consolidating petitions and presenting decisions to the sultan

function.zh: 负责土地税、关税、采邑登记、铸币、预算与国库收支
function.en: Responsible for land taxes, customs, timar registration, minting, budgets, and treasury income and expenditure

function.zh: 起草敕令、保存档案、管理帝国文书与对外往来
function.en: Drafted decrees, preserved archives, and managed imperial documentation and foreign correspondence

function.zh: 管理法官任命、宗教教育、伊斯兰法解释与宗教基金
function.en: Managed the appointment of judges, religious education, interpretation of Islamic law, and pious foundations

function.zh: 管理托普卡帕宫廷、内廷教育、禁卫军与御用事务
function.en: Managed the Topkapi palace, inner court education, household guards, and imperial service

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政依托行省总督、桑贾克贝伊、卡迪与税务承包及采邑体制共同运作。司法与行政并行，中央通过巡察、登记册和任免制度维持控制。
localAdmin.en: Local administration operated through provincial governors, sanjak-beys, qadis, and tax-farming and timar mechanisms. Judicial and administrative authority functioned in parallel, while the center maintained control through inspection, registers, and appointments.

legalSystem.zh: 法律体系结合伊斯兰教法、苏丹敕令法和地方习惯。家族、婚姻和宗教事务多依教法审理，财政、刑政与土地管理则广泛依赖苏丹法令。
legalSystem.en: The legal system combined Islamic sharia, sultanic law, and local custom. Family, marriage, and religious matters were often judged under religious law, while fiscal, criminal, and land administration relied heavily on sultanic regulations.

taxationSystem.zh: 主要税收包括土地税、农业什一税、畜税、人头税、关税、矿税和城市商业杂税。许多地区通过采邑分配税源，部分收入则直接归入国库或由包税人征收。
taxationSystem.en: Major taxes included land tax, agricultural tithe, livestock taxes, poll tax, customs duties, mining levies, and urban commercial imposts. In many areas revenues were assigned through timars, while other income went directly to the treasury or was collected by tax farmers.

religion.zh: 国家以逊尼派伊斯兰教为主导，但帝国内部长期容纳东正教、亚美尼亚教会、犹太教及其他宗教社群，在米利特雏形和地方自治中维持秩序。
religion.en: The state was dominated by Sunni Islam, yet the empire long accommodated Orthodox Christians, the Armenian Church, Judaism, and other communities, maintaining order through early millet-like arrangements and local autonomy.

philosophy.zh: 思想基础以伊斯兰法学、逊尼正统神学、波斯—伊斯兰政治文化和突厥王权传统为核心，同时受希腊—拜占庭遗产与苏菲修行影响。
philosophy.en: Its intellectual foundations centered on Islamic jurisprudence, Sunni orthodox theology, Perso-Islamic political culture, and Turkic traditions of kingship, while also reflecting Greek-Byzantine legacies and Sufi spirituality.

writingSystem.zh: 行政与文学主要使用奥斯曼土耳其语，采用阿拉伯字母书写；阿拉伯语用于宗教学术，波斯语在诗歌与宫廷文化中仍具重要地位。
writingSystem.en: Administration and literature primarily used Ottoman Turkish written in the Arabic script; Arabic served religious scholarship, while Persian remained important in poetry and court culture.

culturalAchievements.zh: 十五世纪末至十六世纪初的奥斯曼文化在建筑、书法、法学、史学和宫廷礼仪方面高度成熟。君士坦丁堡被改造为伊斯兰帝国首都，清真寺、宗教学校、浴场、市场和慈善建筑不断扩建；细密画、金饰手稿与宫廷音乐亦蓬勃发展。
culturalAchievements.en: By the late fifteenth and early sixteenth centuries, Ottoman culture was highly developed in architecture, calligraphy, jurisprudence, historiography, and court ceremony. Constantinople was being reshaped into an Islamic imperial capital through the expansion of mosques, madrasas, baths, markets, and charitable complexes; miniature painting, illuminated manuscripts, and court music also flourished.

languageFamily.zh: 统治语言属突厥语族，帝国内同时广泛使用希腊语、阿拉伯语、亚美尼亚语、斯拉夫语和阿尔巴尼亚语等
languageFamily.en: The ruling language belonged to the Turkic family, while Greek, Arabic, Armenian, Slavic languages, Albanian, and others were also widely spoken across the empire

gdpDescription.zh: 帝国经济总量位居当时世界前列，建立在巴尔干与安纳托利亚高产农业、地中海与黑海贸易、城市手工业、征服带来的财政整合以及连接欧亚非商路的地理优势之上。
gdpDescription.en: The empire’s overall economic output ranked among the largest in the world, built on productive Balkan and Anatolian agriculture, Mediterranean and Black Sea trade, urban crafts, fiscal integration resulting from conquest, and a strategic position linking Afro-Eurasian trade routes.

mainIndustries.zh: 农业、畜牧、纺织、金属加工、造船、军械制造、陶瓷、皮革、地毯、染色和区域转口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Agriculture, pastoralism, textiles, metalworking, shipbuilding, armaments manufacture, ceramics, leatherwork, carpets, dyeing, and regional entrepot trade

tradeGoods.zh: 谷物、羊毛、棉布、丝绸、皮革、地毯、铜铁制品、奴隶、香料转口品、木材、蜂蜡、盐和马匹
tradeGoods.en: Grain, wool, cotton textiles, silk, leather, carpets, copper and iron goods, slaves, re-exported spices, timber, beeswax, salt, and horses

householdWealth.zh: 普通农户财富主要体现在土地使用权、牲畜、农具和储粮；城市家庭则依赖作坊、库存、住房和行业行会网络。地区差异显著，巴尔干粮区与安纳托利亚商业城市相对富裕。
householdWealth.en: Ordinary rural household wealth lay chiefly in land-use rights, livestock, tools, and stored grain; urban families depended more on workshops, inventories, housing, and guild networks. Regional differences were significant, with grain-rich Balkan zones and commercial Anatolian cities relatively prosperous.

economicSystem.zh: 经济制度为国家监督下的农业税收经济与市场交换并存体制。帝国通过采邑、关税、行会管理、官方仓储与战略物资控制影响经济，但并未消灭私商与地方市场活力。
economicSystem.en: The economic system combined a state-supervised agrarian tax economy with active market exchange. The empire shaped economic life through timars, customs duties, guild regulation, official storage, and control over strategic goods, but did not eliminate private merchants or local market dynamism.

category.en: Roads, storage, relief, and miscellaneous spending

treasuryDescription.zh: 国库相对充实，既有现金储备，也有粮食、军需和贵金属储藏。巴耶济德二世时期总体财政较稳健，但战争、宫廷开支和铸币质量变化始终构成压力。
treasuryDescription.en: The treasury was relatively full, consisting of cash reserves as well as stocks of grain, military supplies, and precious metals. Under Bayezid II, overall finances were comparatively stable, though warfare, court expenditure, and changes in coin quality remained constant pressures.

fiscalPolicy.zh: 财政政策强调维持边疆军费、保护主要税源、保证城市供应和稳定货币流通。中央偏好渐进增收而非剧烈改革，并在需要时使用包税、征调和临时加派来应对支出。
fiscalPolicy.en: Fiscal policy emphasized sustaining frontier military costs, protecting major revenue sources, securing urban supply, and maintaining monetary circulation. The central government generally preferred gradual revenue enhancement over drastic reform, using tax farming, requisitioning, and extraordinary levies when needed.

description.zh: 直属苏丹的精锐常备步兵，训练有素，装备火器与冷兵器，是中央军核心
description.en: Elite standing infantry directly attached to the sultan, well trained and equipped with firearms and melee weapons, forming the core of the central army

description.zh: 由苏丹直属骑兵与宫廷军构成，承担护卫、突击和战场机动任务
description.en: Comprised of the sultan’s household cavalry and court troops, serving in guard, shock, and battlefield maneuver roles

description.zh: 帝国军力主体，由持有采邑的骑兵在战时率随从应征，覆盖各行省
description.en: The main body of imperial military strength, made up of timar-holding cavalry who reported for service with retainers in wartime across the provinces

description.zh: 负责火炮操作、攻城、铸炮、筑垒和军械运输，体现奥斯曼攻城技术优势
description.en: Responsible for artillery operation, siegecraft, cannon casting, fortification work, and transport, reflecting Ottoman strength in siege warfare

description.zh: 以桨帆战船、水手、海军步兵和港口军官组成，活跃于爱琴海、东地中海与黑海
description.en: Composed of oared warships, sailors, naval infantry, and port officers, active in the Aegean, eastern Mediterranean, and Black Sea

name.zh: 地方守军与边境辅助军

description.zh: 包括阿金哲轻骑、边疆守军和各类辅助部队，用于侦察、袭扰与守备
description.en: Included akinci light cavalry, frontier garrisons, and various auxiliaries used for reconnaissance, raiding, and local defense

commanderInChief.zh: 苏丹巴耶济德二世（战时），平时由大维齐尔与高级帕夏分掌军政
commanderInChief.en: Sultan Bayezid II in wartime, with the grand vizier and senior pashas exercising major military-administrative authority in peacetime

technology.zh: 奥斯曼军队在火炮、攻城术、军械制造和常备步兵制度方面居同时代前列。火绳枪与大型攻城炮已普遍用于要塞作战，但野战中骑兵仍占重要地位。
technology.en: The Ottoman military ranked among the foremost of its age in artillery, siegecraft, armaments production, and standing infantry organization. Matchlock firearms and large siege guns were widely used in fortress warfare, though cavalry still played a major role in field combat.

threats.zh: 主要威胁来自西方的匈牙利与其他中欧基督教势力、地中海上的威尼斯海军竞争，以及东方不断增长的萨法维宗教与政治挑战。
threats.en: Major threats came from Hungary and other central European Christian powers in the west, Venetian naval rivalry in the Mediterranean, and the growing political and religious challenge of the Safavids in the east.

populationDescription.zh: 帝国人口庞大且高度多样，主要集中于巴尔干、安纳托利亚、鲁米利亚诸平原和大城市周边。穆斯林人口不断增加，但基督徒与犹太社群仍占重要比例，形成多民族多宗教帝国结构。
populationDescription.en: The empire’s population was large and highly diverse, concentrated especially in the Balkans, Anatolia, Rumelia’s plains, and around major cities. The Muslim population was growing, but Christians and Jews still formed substantial communities, creating a multiethnic and multireligious imperial structure.

socialClasses.zh: 主要社会阶层包括宫廷与军政精英、乌理玛与法官、行会商人与工匠、城市平民、农民、游牧与半游牧部族、非穆斯林宗教共同体以及被役使的奴隶与俘虏人口。
socialClasses.en: Major social classes included court and military-administrative elites, ulema and judges, guild merchants and artisans, urban commoners, peasants, nomadic and semi-nomadic tribes, non-Muslim religious communities, and enslaved or captive populations.

allies.zh: 奥斯曼在1500年前后并无稳定意义上的长期盟国，但与部分意大利城邦、黑海附庸与边疆属国保持务实关系；法国式的正式反哈布斯堡联盟尚未形成。
allies.en: Around 1500 the Ottomans had no stable long-term allies in the later sense, but maintained pragmatic relations with some Italian city-states, Black Sea dependents, and frontier tributaries; a formal Franco-Ottoman anti-Habsburg alignment had not yet emerged.

enemies.zh: 主要敌对者包括威尼斯共和国、匈牙利王国、若干巴尔干基督教边疆势力，以及东方正在崛起并煽动安纳托利亚什叶派网络的萨法维力量。
enemies.en: Principal enemies included the Republic of Venice, the Kingdom of Hungary, various Christian frontier powers in the Balkans, and the rising Safavid power in the east, which was stirring Shi'i networks in Anatolia.

foreignPolicy.zh: 外交政策以维护巴尔干优势、压制地中海海上竞争、控制黑海贸易圈并防范伊朗高原方向的新兴对手为核心。奥斯曼同时善于利用和约、附庸关系、贸易特权与军事威慑并行施策。
foreignPolicy.en: Foreign policy centered on preserving dominance in the Balkans, suppressing Mediterranean maritime rivals, controlling the Black Sea commercial sphere, and guarding against emerging opponents from the Iranian plateau. The Ottomans skillfully combined treaties, tributary relations, commercial privileges, and military deterrence.

keyInnovations.zh: 关键优势包括大型火炮铸造、火绳枪步兵制度、攻城工程、地中海桨帆舰建造、精密文书档案管理和结合伊斯兰与拜占庭传统的城市基础设施建设。
keyInnovations.en: Key strengths included large-scale cannon casting, matchlock infantry organization, siege engineering, Mediterranean galley construction, sophisticated chancery recordkeeping, and urban infrastructure drawing on both Islamic and Byzantine traditions.

strengths.zh: 帝国在1500年处于强盛期，拥有卓越的地缘位置、庞大人口、稳定税源、精锐常备军、成熟行政体系和能够整合多民族地区的政治能力。
strengths.en: In 1500 the empire was in a strong phase, possessing an outstanding strategic location, a large population, dependable revenue sources, elite standing forces, a mature administrative apparatus, and the political capacity to integrate many ethnic regions.

weaknesses.zh: 其弱点在于王位继承不稳、中央与地方利益时常冲突、对军事扩张财政的长期依赖，以及东部宗教政治动员可能引发的内部动荡。
weaknesses.en: Its weaknesses lay in uncertain succession, frequent tensions between central and provincial interests, long-term dependence on expansionary military finance, and the possibility of internal unrest triggered by eastern religious-political mobilization.

outlook.zh: 总体前景极为乐观。若能控制东部萨法维挑战并维持财政与军制平衡，奥斯曼帝国将在未来数十年继续向东欧、阿拉伯地区和地中海扩张，成为近代早期世界最重要的超级强权之一。
outlook.en: The overall outlook was highly favorable. If it could contain the Safavid challenge in the east and preserve balance in finance and military organization, the Ottoman Empire would continue expanding into eastern Europe, the Arab lands, and the Mediterranean, becoming one of the foremost superpowers of the early modern world.

description.zh: 奥斯曼帝国横跨巴尔干与安纳托利亚，是欧亚交界最强大帝国之一。
description.en: Spanning the Balkans and Anatolia, the Ottoman Empire was one of the most powerful states of the Afro-Eurasian world.

governmentForm.zh: 强化中的封建-王室官僚君主制，依靠王室议会、财政法院与郡治体系统治全国
governmentForm.en: A strengthening feudal-royal bureaucratic monarchy, ruling the realm through the royal council, fiscal courts, and the county system

socialStructure.zh: 社会由国王、世俗与教会贵族、乡绅、城市商人与行会成员、佃农与自由农、雇工及贫民构成；15世纪末玫瑰战争后，大贵族势力相对削弱，乡绅与王室任命官员的重要性上升
socialStructure.en: Society consisted of the king, secular and ecclesiastical nobility, gentry, urban merchants and guild members, tenants and free peasants, laborers, and the poor; after the Wars of the Roses, the great magnates were relatively weakened, while the gentry and crown-appointed officials grew in importance

rulingClass.zh: 都铎王室、主教与世俗贵族、枢密顾问、财政与司法高官，以及在地方治理中发挥关键作用的乡绅阶层
rulingClass.en: The Tudor monarchy, bishops and lay nobility, privy councillors, senior fiscal and judicial officers, and the gentry who played a crucial role in local governance

succession.zh: 父系世袭君主制，原则上由合法男性继承人为先；但15世纪的王位争夺使王朝合法性同时依赖议会确认、贵族支持与军事胜利
succession.en: Patrilineal hereditary monarchy, in principle favoring legitimate male heirs; yet the fifteenth-century succession struggles meant dynastic legitimacy also depended on parliamentary recognition, noble support, and military success

structure.zh: 中央政府以国王为核心，经由王室议会、枢密顾问集团、财政署、国库法院、星室法庭、王座法庭、普通诉讼法庭与衡平体系运作；地方则由郡长、治安法官、验尸官、市政官与教区网络执行政令
structure.en: Central government revolved around the king, operating through the royal council, a privy advisory circle, the Exchequer, Court of Treasury, Star Chamber, King's Bench, Court of Common Pleas, and the equity system; locally, royal orders were carried out by sheriffs, justices of the peace, coroners, municipal officers, and parish networks

function.zh: 为国王提供政务、司法、外交与安全建议，协调中央行政与重大案件审理
function.en: Advised the king on governance, justice, diplomacy, and security, and coordinated central administration and major legal cases

function.zh: 管理王室常规收入、租地、关税、审计与账册，监督税收征解
function.en: Managed ordinary crown revenue, rents, customs, audits, and records, and supervised tax collection

function.zh: 以更灵活的内廷财政方式直接处理国王收入与支出，是亨利七世强化财政控制的重要工具
function.en: Handled the king's receipts and expenditures through a more flexible household-based financial system, a key instrument of Henry VII's tighter fiscal control

function.zh: 征收羊毛、呢绒与进口货物关税，监管主要港口贸易
function.en: Collected customs on wool, cloth, and imported goods, and regulated trade at major ports

function.zh: 包括王座法庭、普通诉讼法庭、衡平与星室体系，处理刑事、民事与特权案件
function.en: Included King's Bench, Common Pleas, equity, and Star Chamber structures, handling criminal, civil, and privileged cases

function.zh: 通过郡长、治安法官与郡法庭维持治安、司法、征税与征召
function.en: Maintained order, justice, taxation, and musters through sheriffs, justices of the peace, and county courts

localAdmin.zh: 地方行政以郡为核心，国王任命郡长并依赖乡绅出任治安法官；自治城市拥有市长、参事会与行会体系；教区也承担救济、登记与基层治理功能
localAdmin.en: Local administration centered on the county, with the king appointing sheriffs and relying on the gentry as justices of the peace; chartered towns had mayors, councils, and guild structures; parishes also handled relief, record-keeping, and grassroots governance

legalSystem.zh: 以普通法为主，辅以衡平法、教会法与王室特权司法；陪审团审理、巡回法官与成文敕令并行，星室法庭尤其用于打击权贵私斗与违法庇护
legalSystem.en: The system was based chiefly on common law, supplemented by equity, canon law, and royal prerogative justice; jury trial, itinerant justices, and written ordinances coexisted, with Star Chamber especially used to curb noble violence and unlawful maintenance

taxationSystem.zh: 财政收入主要来自王室地产、封建权利、关税、司法罚金、议会批准的非常税与债券担保；亨利七世偏好以王室常规收入和严格征收减少对议会直接课税的依赖
taxationSystem.en: Revenue came mainly from crown lands, feudal dues, customs, judicial fines, parliamentary extraordinary taxation, and bonds and recognizances; Henry VII preferred to reduce reliance on direct parliamentary taxation by strengthening ordinary crown revenues and enforcing collection rigorously

religion.zh: 以拉丁基督教中的罗马天主教为国教，修道院、教区与主教区网络深植社会生活，朝圣、弥撒、圣徒崇拜与教会节期仍极为重要
religion.en: Roman Catholicism within Latin Christianity was the established religion, and the networks of monasteries, parishes, and dioceses were deeply embedded in social life; pilgrimage, the mass, saintly devotion, and the church calendar remained highly important

philosophy.zh: 思想上以经院神学、基督教伦理与初步文艺复兴人文主义并存；牛津与剑桥中逐渐出现对古典拉丁文、修辞与治理技艺的更高重视
philosophy.en: Intellectual life combined scholastic theology, Christian moral thought, and early Renaissance humanism; at Oxford and Cambridge there was growing attention to classical Latin, rhetoric, and the arts of governance

writingSystem.zh: 使用拉丁字母；行政与教会文书常用拉丁文，法律领域保留法律法语传统，英语在宫廷、商业与文学中的地位持续上升
writingSystem.en: The Latin alphabet was used; administrative and ecclesiastical documents were often in Latin, the legal sphere retained Law French traditions, and English continued to rise in status in courtly, commercial, and literary use

culturalAchievements.zh: 英格兰在15世纪末至16世纪初的文化成就包括威斯敏斯特印刷业的发展、教堂建筑和晚期垂直式哥特风格、王室礼仪的强化，以及以托马斯·马洛礼俗文学和晚中世纪宗教戏剧为代表的文学传统
culturalAchievements.en: England's cultural achievements in the late fifteenth and early sixteenth centuries included the growth of printing at Westminster, church building in the late Perpendicular Gothic style, the strengthening of royal ceremony, and literary traditions represented by works such as those associated with Thomas Malory and late medieval religious drama

languageFamily.zh: 主要语言属西日耳曼语支的英语；上层文化同时深受拉丁语与法语传统影响
languageFamily.en: The main language was English, part of the West Germanic branch; elite culture was also strongly shaped by Latin and French traditions

gdpDescription.zh: 1500年前后的英格兰经济以农业为主，但已明显商业化，羊毛与呢绒出口对国民财富极为关键；伦敦的市场集散、东南部的商品农业、港口贸易和财政集中度使其在欧洲中属于中上水平王国经济
gdpDescription.en: Around 1500 the English economy remained primarily agricultural but was already strongly commercialized, with wool and especially cloth exports central to national wealth; London's market concentration, commercial farming in the southeast, port trade, and growing fiscal centralization made it a middle-to-upper-tier kingdom economy by European standards

mainIndustries.zh: 谷物与畜牧农业、养羊、毛纺与呢绒制造、皮革、采锡与采铅、渔业、酿酒、造船与港口贸易
mainIndustries.en: Arable and pastoral agriculture, sheep raising, woolen cloth production, leatherworking, tin and lead mining, fisheries, brewing, shipbuilding, and port commerce

tradeGoods.zh: 出口呢绒、原毛、锡、铅、皮革；进口葡萄酒、盐、香料、丝绸、优质金属制品、染料与奢侈品
tradeGoods.en: Exports included cloth, raw wool, tin, lead, and leather; imports included wine, salt, spices, silk, fine metal goods, dyestuffs, and luxury wares

householdWealth.zh: 家庭财富差异极大。乡绅和富商可拥有土地、租金收益、现金储备和银器；普通农户多以土地使用权、牲畜、农具和粮食储备为主要资产，抗风险能力有限
